message:
Remove unused os import from e2e manifest validator

The os module was imported but never referenced in the validation
script, which uses argparse, hashlib, json, re, sys, and pathlib
for its work. Removing the unused import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,6 @@
 import argparse
 import hashlib
 import json
-import os
 import re
 import sys
 from copy import deepcopy
